description: Explicit UI contract for the Sovereign portal /risk route.

header.title: Risk
header.subtitle: Composite risk index and contributing factors.

non_negotiables: Page renders TWO cards in a 2-column grid: RiskTimelineCard (left) and HeatmapCard (right).
Both cards reuse the dashboard components verbatim — no divergence in geometry or tokens.
y-axis ceiling is 50 for the risk timeline.
Heatmap alpha-gradient anchor max is 4 (matches the dashboard's heatmap).
